purpose: TypeScript interfaces for all entities and state shapes
React Context + useReducer global state: CRUD, seed data, localStorage sync, toast
Utilities: formatDate, formatNumber, classNames, generateId, exportJSON, importJSON
Root layout: Inter font, dark theme, metadata
Tailwind directives + CSS custom properties + animations
Landing page: hero, features 6+, pricing 3 tiers, FAQ 6+, social proof, CTA, footer
Dashboard layout: sidebar nav + topbar + StoreProvider wrapper
Dashboard home: computed stat cards, charts from real data, activity feed
Entity CRUD: data table, create/edit/delete modals, search, sort, filter, bulk
Settings: profile form, notification toggles, data export/import/reset
